schema_note: Copilot Studio agent — built in Power Platform Copilot Studio UI, not deployed via declarative manifest. This file documents the bot configuration for reference.
name: Conditional Access Change Companion
description: Guides admins through CA policy changes, validates impact before apply, and requires approval for changes affecting >100 users or privileged roles.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: What would happen if I added compliant device requirement to All Users?
I want to block legacy auth for guests — what's the blast radius?
Review my planned CA change: adding SharePoint to MFA required apps

power_automate_flows: Impact assessment — resolve group sizes via Graph
Approval flow — route high-impact changes to security manager
Rollback artifact — export current policy state as JSON
